name: WinGet-PSADT-GUI-Tool
description: WinGet-PSADT-GUI-Tool is a Windows PowerShell WPF GUI that streamlines Win32 app packaging and Intune deployment. It integrates WinGet search, installer download, PSADT scaffolding, and GUI-driven configuration of install/uninstall/repair logic, enabling generation of .intunewin packages and direct upload to Intune via Microsoft Graph. It outputs standard PSADT/Intune artifacts and provides live monitoring of packaging and upload steps.
author: Dhiraj Dhote

securityCheck.aiSummary: The reviewed code appears to be an Intune-related GUI/Toolkit with normal admin tooling patterns (module loading, logging, UI). Two patterns warrant caution: (1) The use of encoded PowerShell command execution (Invoke-WindowsPowerShellCommand) which can be leveraged to obfuscate or bypass policy if inputs are not validated; (2) Dot-sourcing multiple module files at startup introduces supply-chain risk and relies on file integrity. There is no evidence of credential theft, data exfiltration, reverse shells, or hardcoded secrets in the provided snippets.
